channel.title: BimaNiti — Insurance & Market Insights
channel.description: Analysing markets, decoding insurance, and sharing insights that matter.

item.title: LIC Q4 FY26 Deep Dive: Record Profit, Surging VNB, and the Margin Story
item.description: LIC reported a record Rs 57,419 crore PAT for FY26 with VNB surging 42%. A deep dive into the performance of India's largest life insurer.

item.title: ICICI Lombard FY26: Health-Led Growth Story Gains Momentum
item.description: ICICI Lombard's Q4 GDPI surged 18.2% — nearly double the industry rate — driven by retail health insurance growing 54%.

item.title: Health Insurance Trends Reshaping India in 2026
item.description: Health insurance premiums grew 14.41% in FY26 driven by GST exemption and rising healthcare awareness.

item.title: SBI Life FY26: Steady Growth, Margin Resilience, and Distribution Strength
item.description: SBI Life delivered 20% NBP growth with VNB margins at 27.5% — the upper end of guidance. A detailed analysis of the insurer's FY26 performance.

item.title: New India Assurance Q4: Profit Jumps 61% but Underwriting Concerns Persist
item.description: New India Assurance reported a 61% jump in Q4 profit, but the combined ratio worsened to 118.34% as wage revision costs of Rs 3,525 crore masked underlying weakness.

item.title: IRDAI's Regulatory Reforms: A New Era for Indian Insurance
item.description: From 100% FDI to risk-based capital norms, IRDAI's regulatory overhaul is reshaping the Indian insurance sector.

item.title: SBI General Insurance Crosses Rs 15,000 Crore GDP: A Growth Milestone
item.description: SBI General Insurance achieved a historic milestone, crossing Rs 15,000 crore in gross direct premium for the first time with 14.5% growth.

item.title: IRDAI's New KMP Governance: Why Your Insurance CEO's Pay Now Depends on Your Claim Experience
item.description: IRDAI has linked insurance executive compensation to customer outcomes — claim settlement speed, grievance redressal, and product performance.

item.title: IRDAI Links Insurance KMP Pay to Customer Outcomes, Mandates Public Disclosures
item.description: IRDAI amended corporate governance norms to link KMP remuneration to customer-centric metrics including claim settlement speed, grievance redressal, and product performance.

item.title: Life Insurance FY26: Mid-Tier Challengers Reshape the Market
item.description: IRDAI's FY2025-26 premium data reveals a structural shift as mid-tier insurers grow at 15.7% in retail premium, challenging the dominance of the Top 5 players.

item.title: Cyber Insurance in India: A Rapidly Growing Market Taking Shape
item.description: India's cyber insurance market is projected to grow at 28% CAGR to reach USD 8.8 billion by 2034, driven by DPDP Act compliance and rising ransomware threats.

item.title: Non-Life Insurance: 9.3% Growth in FY26 Amid Regulatory Shifts
item.description: The non-life insurance sector grew 9.3% to Rs 3.36 trillion in FY26, driven by health insurance and GST relief.

item.title: Ind AS 117: The Accounting Revolution Reshaping Indian Insurance
item.description: Ind AS 117 came into effect from April 2026, fundamentally changing how insurers recognise revenue, report profits, and communicate financial performance.

item.title: LIC Q4 FY26: Net Profit Surges 23% to Rs 23,467 Crore, Board Declares Rs 10 Dividend and 1:1 Bonus
item.description: LIC reported a 23% YoY rise in Q4 net profit to Rs 23,467 crore, with FY26 PAT reaching a record Rs 57,419 crore. The board declared a Rs 10/share dividend and a 1:1 bonus issue.

item.title: GST Exemption on Insurance: Analysing the Impact Six Months On
item.description: Six months since the GST exemption on life and health insurance policies came into effect, we analyse the impact on premium growth and affordability.

item.title: Risk-Based Capital in India: What It Means for Insurers and Policyholders
item.description: India's shift to a risk-based capital regime from April 2026 will fundamentally change how insurers price risk, allocate capital, and report profits.

item.title: India's Rising Position in the Global Insurance Landscape
item.description: India is now the 10th largest insurance market globally with 1.8% market share. Swiss Re forecasts India will be the fastest-growing major insurance market over 2026-2030.

item.title: New India Assurance Q4: Profit Jumps 61% to Rs 558 Crore on Investment Income
item.description: New India Assurance reported 61% YoY growth in Q4 PAT to Rs 558 crore. FY26 PAT rose 40% to Rs 1,384 crore.

item.title: Motor Insurance in India: Navigating Change in 2026
item.description: Motor insurance, the largest segment in India's general insurance industry, is undergoing significant changes with GST rationalisation and regulatory shifts.

item.title: Standalone Health Insurers Lead with 17.89% Premium Growth as Health Awareness Rises
item.description: Standalone health insurers recorded 17.89% growth with premium collections of Rs 35,815 crore up to January 2026.
